arguments.name: There are no input arguments for this command.

outputs.description: The unique identifier of the Azure Kubernetes subscription. AzureKS.Subscription.authorizationSource The source of authorization for the Azure Kubernetes subscription.
outputs.name: AzureKS.Subscription.id

outputs.description: The tenants that have access to manage the Azure Kubernetes subscription. AzureKS.Subscription.subscriptionId The ID of the Azure Kubernetes subscription.
outputs.name: AzureKS.Subscription.managedByTenants

outputs.description: The ID of the tenant associated with the Azure Kubernetes subscription. AzureKS.Subscription.displayName The display name of the Azure Kubernetes subscription.
outputs.name: AzureKS.Subscription.tenantId

outputs.description: The current state of the Azure Kubernetes subscription. AzureKS.Subscription.subscriptionPolicies.locationPlacementId The ID of the location placement policy for the Azure Kubernetes subscription.
outputs.name: AzureKS.Subscription.state

outputs.description: The ID of the quota policy for the Azure Kubernetes subscription. AzureKS.Subscription.subscriptionPolicies.spendingLimit The spending limit policy for the Azure Kubernetes subscription.
outputs.name: AzureKS.Subscription.subscriptionPolicies.quotaId

outputs.description: The type of the Azure Kubernetes subscription count. AzureKS.Subscription.count.value The value of the Azure Kubernetes subscription count.
outputs.name: AzureKS.Subscription.count.type
